code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let token = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(n)
    if n > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  when None
  end
  i = i + 1
end
print("positive=#{count}")
